channel.title: MasterChess News
channel.description: Official news of MasterChess.live — platform updates, founder story, tournaments and community.

item.title: How a 13-Year-Old Built MasterChess.live — The Full Story
item.description: Nikola Šakotić, 13, from Serbia, built MasterChess.live by himself — every line of code, every bot, every pixel. This is the full story.

item.title: Meeting Hans Niemann at the Board in Belgrade
item.description: MasterChess.live founder Nikola Šakotić at the Serbian Chess Federation board where Hans Niemann faced Ian Nepomniachtchi.

item.title: Backstage with a Grandmaster: Lessons from the Top
item.description: Four lessons from a grandmaster — and how they shape the next training tools on MasterChess.live.

item.title: Founder's Letter: Why MasterChess.live Exists
item.description: An open letter from MasterChess.live founder Nikola Šakotić about why he built a free, ad-free chess platform at 13.

item.title: MasterChess.live Launch Notes — Everything That's Live Today
item.description: A full map of every feature live on MasterChess.live today — play, compete, learn, identity.

item.title: Roadmap 2026: Tournaments, Clans, and Battle Royale
item.description: What ships next on MasterChess.live — arena tournaments, clan quests, battle royale and native mobile apps.

item.title: A 13-Year-Old Who Built His Own Chess App
item.description: Meet Nikola Šakotić, the Serbian U14 Chess Champion who built MasterChess.live — a free chess platform for competitive players.

item.title: MasterChess Wears the Brand at Top Serbian Chess Events
item.description: MasterChess shows up at top-tier chess events in Serbia, building the brand in person and online.

item.title: New Analysis System Released on MasterChess.live
item.description: Move-by-move classification, key-moment highlighting and one-click opening detection — free on MasterChess.live.

item.title: Weekly Signature Tournaments Now Live on MasterChess.live
item.description: MasterChess Monday, Friday Night Fire and Sunday Classic — three signature events every week.
